records.v: Many adhesion on air sac. Old Airsacculitis
Feathers removed from both wing, Uric acid deposits on kidney, kidney enlarged
Vermiform mass attached to the stomach. No biopsy taken because was not approved by Pau sir.
Spiral structure like. And masses like folicules attached to the serosa of the stomach
Small folicules and development of the epididimum irregular
